title: HOMAITER Drain Unblocker, 2PCS Powerful Cleaner Formula, Removes Hair, Grease & Soap Scum, Safe for Pipes and Septic Systems
features: Instantly Clears Blocked Drains: HOMAITER Drain Unblocker is a powerful and effective solution for clearing clogged drains. Quickly dissolves hair, grease, soap scum, and food build-up without damaging your plumbing

friendly product: Ideal for homeowners, renters, and anyone who faces recurring drain issues. Perfect for busy kitchens, bathrooms, and showers, clog remover for sink is your go-to solution for maintaining clean and free-flowing drains
Multiple Uses: Best drain cleaner, safe for use in both kitchen and bathroom drains, it provides a quick, easy fix for stubborn clogs. Simply pour, wait, and enjoy free-flowing drains in minutes
Safe for Pipes and Septic Systems: Safe for use on all types of pipes, including PVC, metal, and older plumbing systems. Compatible with septic tanks
Easy-to-Use: Simply pour and wait 5-10 minutes for quick results—no need for tools. Gentle on your plumbing while effectively clearing tough clogs
description: From the brand Household Cleaning Products Our cleaners are upgraded formulas and highly effective cleaning products that can make your home hygiene cleaner. Previous page HOMAITER Household Cleaning Next page
